overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player character moves from a covered market area beneath a massive red bridge, through an open plaza with artificial turf and food vendors, up a grand illuminated staircase, and onto a palm-lined main street with towering skyscrapers in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway beneath red bridge

events.description: moving deeper into shadow under the bridge structure, neon lights becoming more prominent

agents.ego_description: walking forward under the massive red bridge structure, passing by neon-lit storefronts and concrete pillars

entered.detail: massive red structural bridge dominating the overhead space
bright cyan neon tubes running along the left wall
food vendor stall with vibrant purple neon lighting
large structural support columns for the overpass

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive red bridge structure in a semi-covered market area. The player walks forward through concrete walkways, passing neon-lit stalls and vending machines while moving through alternating patches of sunlight and shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with artificial turf and food vendors

events.description: exiting the covered bridge area into an open sunlit plaza with green artificial turf
turning right to navigate around a gathered group of NPCs near the food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, observing the neon-lit food stalls and navigating around groups of gathered NPCs

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall with purple neon lighting
group of pedestrians gathered in conversation on the artificial turf

entered.detail: green artificial grass covering the plaza floor
traditional Japanese architectural structure with curved roof among modern buildings
traditional red paper lanterns hanging near the food stalls

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from under the bridge into a bright open plaza covered in artificial green turf. Various NPCs mill about near food stalls adorned with purple neon lights and traditional paper lanterns. A Japanese-style building stands prominently in the center of the plaza as the player navigates through the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with graffiti and stacked crates

events.description: entering a narrower passage between buildings, leaving the open plaza behind
passing a large digital billboard displaying 'YOUR TASTE' advertisement

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow alleyway, passing stacked crates and graffiti-covered walls while following the path

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red hair walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen showing 'YOUR TASTE' with product imagery
piles of wooden crates and construction materials stacked against the wall
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
tree with pink cherry blossoms visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the open plaza and enters a narrow alleyway between buildings. The environment shifts to concrete sidewalks with graffiti-covered walls and stacked crates. A large digital billboard becomes visible as the player approaches a transition area with a cherry blossom tree in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with neon green overhead lighting

events.description: beginning ascent up a wide staircase with illuminated steps
reaching the top of the stairs, entering a covered walkway with green neon ceiling panels

agents.ego_description: climbing a wide staircase illuminated by bright green neon lights overhead, then moving through the upper covered walkway

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with illuminated edges leading upward
bright green illuminated panels forming a canopy over the stairs
building with prominent 'SPHERE' signage in yellow and red

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a grand staircase illuminated by vibrant green neon overhead lights. At the top, the scene transitions to a covered walkway with the 'SPHERE' building visible to the left. The environment shifts from ground level to an elevated pedestrian area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street promenade with palm trees and distant skyline

events.description: descending to main street level, entering open boulevard with palm trees
approaching intersection with traffic lights and observing flying vehicles overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the main promenade with palm trees, heading toward the city center with towering skyscrapers and flying vehicles overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the city center

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings in the distance
overhead traffic signal structure spanning the street
futuristic aircraft and vehicles flying between the skyscrapers
massive curved digital billboard displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player descends to a wide main street lined with palm trees and futuristic architecture. The scene opens up to reveal a sprawling city skyline with towering skyscrapers, flying vehicles overhead, and heavy neon signage. The player walks along the wet reflective sidewalk toward a distant intersection with traffic lights, surrounded by other pedestrians moving in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban market into the sprawling, neon-lit heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins beneath the massive red structure of a bridge, moving through a semi-covered market of concrete walkways and flickering neon stalls. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the environment opens into a bright plaza of artificial green turf and purple-lit food stalls before narrowing again into a graffiti-lined alleyway. The scene then ascends a grand staircase bathed in vibrant green light, shifting from the ground level to an elevated walkway where the Sphere building becomes visible. Finally, the camera descends onto a wide, wet main street lined with palm trees, revealing a vast skyline of towering skyscrapers and flying vehicles under a canopy of heavy neon signage.
